common.tagline: Find your true north in weight and lifestyle

hero.title: Find your true north to lasting, healthy change
hero.subtitle: Personalised, judgement-free coaching that fits your real life — sustainable nutrition, movement and habits, in English or Spanish. Start with a free 30-minute consult.

services.title: A complete, sustainable approach
services.subtitle: Not a one-size diet — a plan shaped around your tastes, routine and goals.
services.nutritionBody: A flexible eating plan around your tastes, budget and routine — no rigid rules or banned foods.
services.movementBody: Realistic activity that builds strength and energy, without living at the gym.
services.habitsBody: Small, lasting changes and a healthier, calmer relationship with food.
services.supportBody: Check-ins and guidance between sessions, so you never feel stuck or alone.

about.name: Sebastián Barrón
about.body1: Sebastián helps people reach a healthier weight and lifestyle through sustainable, personalised coaching — not extreme diets or quick fixes.
about.body2: His approach is warm, practical and judgement-free, and he works in both English and Spanish so you can be understood in the language you think in.
about.calloutBody: This is lifestyle and weight coaching, not medical treatment. If anything in your health needs a doctor, Sebastián will tell you and help you get the right care first.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps — the first one is free.
how.step1Body: A relaxed, no-pressure 30-minute call to understand your goals and answer your questions.
how.step2Body: A short, secure questionnaire so your plan is built around your real life and health.
how.step3Body: Nutrition, movement and habits — with check-ins and support along the way.

testimonials.title: Change that actually lasts
testimonials.note: Sample stories — to be replaced with real client testimonials.
testimonials.q1: For the first time I'm not on a diet I dread. It finally fits my life, and the weight is staying off.
testimonials.q2: Being able to do it in Spanish made all the difference. I felt understood from day one.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: No. There are no banned foods or rigid rules — we build a flexible, sustainable plan around your tastes and routine so the changes actually last.
faq.a2: Yes. Sebastián coaches fully in English or Spanish — whichever you're most comfortable with.
faq.q3: Is this medical or clinical care?
faq.a3: No. This is non-clinical lifestyle and weight coaching. If anything in your health needs a doctor, we'll tell you and help you get the right care first.
faq.q4: What happens in the free consult?
faq.a4: A relaxed 30-minute call to understand your goals, answer your questions, and see if we're a good fit — no pressure or commitment.

consult.title: Ready to find your true north?
consult.subtitle: Pick a time that suits you for a free, no-pressure 30-minute call.

approach.title: Coaching, not clinical care
approach.body: This is lifestyle and weight coaching, not medical treatment. If anything in your health needs a doctor, we'll tell you and help you get the right care first.

disclaimer.text: SB My Weight Compass provides non-clinical lifestyle and weight coaching. It is not medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Always consult your GP or a qualified health professional about your individual circumstances.
